name: adg-governance
description: Deterministic ADG governance workflows for bounded agent delivery, route/persona UX truth passes, standards evidence, and auditable deliverables. Shares one policy and rulebook with the Claude Code adapter (.claude-plugin) so both harnesses enforce the same rules in one repo.

interface.shortDescription: Bound agents to auditable feature slices.
interface.longDescription: ADG Governance provides deterministic planning, validation, and evidence workflows that reduce rework by connecting requirements, UX contracts, RBAC, standards, tests, and deliverables before code is edited.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use ADG Governance to plan a bounded, auditable feature slice before implementation.
